### Comment 1 by @coderabbitai[bot] (apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/[id]/outline/_actions/generate-outline.action.ts:492)
```diff
@@ -486,10 +481,15 @@ Generate a presentation outline.`;
 		throw new Error("Failed to generate outline with LLM");

-	// Strip markdown code fences if present
+	// Strip markdown code fences if present - more robust handling
 	const strippedContent = content
-		.replace(/^```(?:json)?\n?/, "")
-		.replace(/```$/, "")
+		// Remove opening fence (```json or ``` at start of string)
+		.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*\n?/, "")
+		// Remove closing fence (``` at end of string)
+		.replace(/```\s*$/, 
```
_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

**Fence stripping is over-broad and can corrupt valid JSON payloads**

Line 491 removes backticks globally, including inside quoted JSON string values, which can alter content or break parsing. Prefer targeted extraction (outer fenced block) and parse attempts, not global replacement.  


<details>
<summary>Suggested fix</summary>

```diff
-	const strippedContent = content
-		// Remove opening fence (```json or ``` at start of string)
-		.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*\n?/, "")
-		// Remove closing fence (``` at end of string)
-		.replace(/```\s*$/, "")
-		// Also handle any stray fences in the middle of content
-		.replace(/```(?:json)?\s*\n/g, "")
-		.replace(/\n```$/g, "")
-		.trim();
+	const trimmedContent = content.trim();
+	const fencedBlock = trimmedContent.match(
+		/^```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```$/i,
+	)?.[1];
+	const strippedContent = (fencedBlock ?? trimmedContent).trim();
```
</details>
